title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.530 - Power of adjournment
text:
492.530.  Power of adjournment. — The officer shall have power to adjourn, from day to day, the taking of such depositions, when the same shall be necessary.
(RSMo 1939 § 1964) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1800; 1919 § 5487; 1909 § 6430
